what_it_does: Records and broadcasts a raised 'signal' that the global decision 'card-visuals-source' has been decided with the option 'Both — family underneath, story on top', and that work gated on that decision may resume.
observations: YAML frontmatter declares id item-07213c43, address board://item-07213c43, type signal, source claude_code, state raised, author_session operator, and a link attached_to decision://global/card-visuals-source
History shows a single transition from null to raised by operator at 2026-06-22T01:48:45.363196+00:00 with note 'filed'
Body states the chosen option is 'Both — family underneath, story on top' and says gated work can RESUME with this option
Explicitly notes that the resume itself is the lane's/operator's gated step
standouts: Chosen option combines 'family underneath' and 'story on top'
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with id, address, type, state, author_session, links, and history
Uses board:// and decision:// URI schemes
Markdown body follows the structured metadata
Signal type is used for a state-change/notification entry
notes: A decision signal that picks a combined visual source for cards and tells gated work it can resume.
questions: What specific work or lanes are gated on decision://global/card-visuals-source?
What do 'family underneath' and 'story on top' mean in concrete UI/UX terms?
Why was 'Both' chosen over the individual alternatives?
Who or what is responsible for performing the actual resume step?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose matches content: it is a decision.decided signal that records the chosen option and authorizes resumption of gated work.
intention_signals: Broadcast a resolved design choice so downstream tasks that were waiting on it can proceed, while keeping the resume action itself as a separate gated step.
novelty: The chosen option is a layered combination ('family underneath, story on top') rather than a single source, framed as a resumption trigger.
contribution: A timestamped, attributable signal that a specific global decision has been made, records the chosen option, links to the decision URI, and communicates that gated work may resume.
summary_for_embedding: A raised noticeboard signal recording the decision card-visuals-source as 'Both — family underneath, story on top' and authorizing resumption of gated work.
intention_for_embedding: To unblock downstream work by announcing a resolved card-visual source decision and the chosen combined option.
